description: Recto (secondary use): Trousseau list. Groom: ʿEzra b. Avraham ha-Kohen. Bride: Khibāʾ bt. Hillel. Marriage payments: 4 + 10. The groom agrees to pay his late marriage gift in dinars "of the worst sort" (זיבורות). Handwriting of Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya? (Information in part from Goitein, Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 254, 482.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
